scenes.summary: 2026년 EBS 여행의 시작, 설레는 마음으로 기차역에 도착해 출발 준비를 하는 장면
scenes.narration: 2026년, 드디어 EBS 여행 출발! 오늘 완전 기대돼요!
scenes.imagePrompt: A cheerful Korean vlog scene at a modern train station in 2026, young traveler holding a small suitcase and EBS travel booklet, bright morning light, excited expression, cinematic but casual vlog style, vibrant colors
scenes.videoPrompt: Handheld vlog-style shot entering a modern train station, traveler waves to the camera with a suitcase, energetic movement, bright morning atmosphere, quick zoom-in on EBS travel booklet, upbeat travel vlog mood

scenes.summary: 이동 중 창밖 풍경과 EBS 여행 코스를 확인하며 들뜬 분위기를 보여주는 장면
scenes.narration: 창밖 풍경 보면서 오늘 코스 체크! 벌써 힐링 시작이에요.
scenes.imagePrompt: Inside a clean modern train, Korean traveler looking out the window at beautiful countryside scenery, holding a tablet showing an EBS travel route map, sunny day, joyful vlog atmosphere, natural light
scenes.videoPrompt: Vlog-style train interior shot, camera pans from passing countryside outside the window to a tablet displaying an EBS travel itinerary, traveler smiles and points at the route, smooth handheld motion, lively and exciting mood

scenes.summary: 여행지에 도착해 랜드마크 앞에서 활기차게 즐기며 브이로그 엔딩을 찍는 장면
scenes.narration: 도착 완료! EBS 여행, 진짜 알차고 신나요. 다음 코스도 같이 가요!
scenes.imagePrompt: Excited Korean traveler filming a vlog in front of a scenic travel landmark, colorful street, lively atmosphere, 2026 travel vibe, holding a camera, bright daylight, energetic and fun
scenes.videoPrompt: Dynamic handheld vlog shot at a popular scenic landmark, traveler spins around smiling, shows the colorful street and landmark behind, ends with a friendly wave to the camera, upbeat energetic travel vlog style
